nasb.text: “But you made the Nazirites drink wine, And you commanded the prophets saying, ‘You shall not prophesy!’

esv.text: “But you made the Nazirites drink wine, and commanded the prophets, saying, ‘You shall not prophesy.’

cnv.text: ‘但你們迫使拿細耳人喝酒， 吩咐先知說：不要說預言。

ccb.text: 可是，你们迫使拿细耳人喝酒， 禁止先知传达我的话。
